system.flavor: You burn and condense your own aether into super condensed form, creating a crackling black orb that inflicts maximum destruction. Without the time to stabilize this attack, its use can rip away your very life force.
system.effect:
Attack: 4 damage. Hit: +2d6
Area effect: 1d6+2
Reckless +2 attack and area damage, creates dangerous terrain under the attack target, and lowers terrain under them by 1.
Effect Sacrifice 999 unless the round number is 4 or higher. All allies can choose to lend their life force instead. If they are all willing, each ally sacrifices 4 instead, and you don't sacrifice anything.

(Sacrifice your limits and spend HP as part of the ability to increase its power. This is not damage and additionally cannot take you past 1 hp. You can continue to sacrifice even if it would take you lower than 1 hp.)
